title: Russia 'relentlessly targeting' critical infrastructure and democracy, GCHQ says
summary_full: The spy agency's head will set out threats facing the UK and the measures she believes need to be taken to confront them on Wednesday.
summary_public: The spy agency's head will set out threats facing the UK and the measures she believes need to be taken to confront them on Wednesday.
